2603.18000.title: AgentFactory: A Self-Evolving Framework Through Executable Subagent Accumulation and Reuse
2603.18000.paper_summary: Building LLM-based agents has become increasingly important. Recent works on LLM-based agent self-evolution primarily record successful experiences as textual prompts or reflections, which cannot reliably guarantee efficient task re-execution in complex scenarios. We propose AgentFactory, a new self-evolution paradigm that preserves successful task solutions as executable subagent code rather than textual experience. Crucially, these subagents are continuously refined based on execution feedback, becoming increasingly robust and efficient as more tasks are encountered. Saved subagents are pure Python code with standardized documentation, enabling portability across any Python-capable system. We demonstrate that AgentFactory enables continuous capability accumulation: its library of executable subagents grows and improves over time, progressively reducing the effort required for similar tasks without manual intervention. Our implementation is open-sourced at https://github.com/zzatpku/AgentFactory, and our demonstration video is available at https://youtu.be/iKSsuAXJHW0.
2603.18000.paper_summary_zh: 建立基於LLM的代理變得越來越重要。最近關於基於LLM的代理自我演化的研究主要記錄成功經驗作為文本提示或反思，這無法可靠地保證在複雜場景中有效的任務重新執行。我們提出了AgentFactory，一種新的自我演化範式，將成功的任務解決方案保存為可執行的子代理代碼，而不是文本經驗。關鍵是，這些子代理根據執行反饋不斷被精煉，隨著遇到更多任務而變得越來越穩健和高效。保存的子代理是純Python代碼，並具有標準化的文檔，使其能夠在任何支持Python的系統中移植。我們展示了AgentFactory能夠實現持續的能力積累：其可執行子代理的庫隨著時間的推移而增長和改進，逐步減少對於類似任務所需的努力，而無需人工干預。我們的實現已開源於 https://github.com/zzatpku/AgentFactory，並且我們的演示視頻可在 https://youtu.be/iKSsuAXJHW0 獲得。
2603.18000.author: Zhang Zhang et.al.
2603.18000.authors: Zhang Zhang, Shuqi Lu, Hongjin Qian, Di He, Zheng Liu
